name: Chucklet Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Grease and flour two layer pans, each measuring 9 inches in diameter and 1 1/2 inches deep.
3. In a large mixing bowl, blend together the dry ingredients: flour, sugar, baking soda, and salt.
4. Add shortening, buttermilk, and vanilla extract to the dry mixture. Beat for 2 minutes at medium speed using an electric mixer, scraping the sides and bottom of the bowl frequently.
5. Add eggs and melted chocolate to the batter. Mix for another 2 minutes at medium speed.
6. Pour the batter into the prepared pans and bake in the preheated oven for 30 to 35 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
7. Allow the cakes to cool completely before frosting with Chucklet Frosting.
